prompt:
A hyper-realistic cinematic portrait of a young South Asian couple standing back-to-back in a lush green garden filled with tall grass and soft natural foliage. Golden hour sunlight filtering through trees, creating warm glowing bokeh and dreamy cinematic atmosphere.

Male wearing deep red traditional kurta with elegant gold embroidery on collar, placket, and cuffs, paired with white shalwar. Clean modern hairstyle, slight smile, confident expression, arms crossed.

Female wearing a stunning red lehenga choli with intricate gold embroidery and matching dupatta draped elegantly. Long straight hair in high ponytail, soft makeup, warm smile, arms crossed.

Both standing back-to-back, slightly angled toward camera, looking directly at viewer. Perfect symmetrical pose, elegant and balanced composition.

Background: lush green garden, tall grass foreground, blurred trees, sun rays, cinematic depth of field, soft bokeh.

Style: ultra-realistic, 85mm lens, f/1.8, DSLR quality, cinematic wedding photoshoot, HDR, ultra-detailed fabric textures, natural skin tones, film color grading.

Mood: romantic, elegant, celebratory, traditional South Asian wedding vibe.

8K resolution, ultra sharp focus on faces, professional retouching, magazine cover quality.
